project_type: Full-stack PWA - FastAPI backend + React/TypeScript frontend with Supabase BaaS
build_system: pip + npm, Vite for frontend builds
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test scripts in package.json, no pytest config)
verification_instructions: 1. Run TypeScript type-check: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit. 2. Run frontend build: cd frontend && npm run build. 3. Verify Python syntax: cd backend && python -m py_compile app/main.py
setup_instructions: 1. cd frontend && npm install. 2. cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22, Python 3.11 available. No Supabase instance for runtime testing.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Frontend uses @tanstack/react-query with useQuery for data fetching (see PropertyListPage.tsx pattern). Backend uses FastAPI routers + service layer pattern. Supabase client via get_supabase(). Migration SQL files in backend/migrations/. The invitations table (003_invitations.sql) has columns: id, token, email, role, organization_id, property_id, expires_at, accepted_at, created_at - NO invited_by or status column.
directory_structure: frontend/src/pages/ (page components), frontend/src/api/ (API client functions), frontend/src/types/ (TypeScript interfaces), frontend/src/stores/ (Zustand stores), backend/app/routers/ (FastAPI route handlers), backend/app/services/ (business logic), backend/migrations/ (SQL schema)
